title: Chat Keybind
description: A simple mod that allows you to easily turn on/off the minecraft chat without going into settings, good for PvP
body:
# Chat Keybind 
This is a simple mod that allows you to easily toggle minecrafts chat visibility. By default, it uses C as the keybind, but if you install mod menu you can change it to what you want. 

Requires fabric, mod menu is optional. With mod meny you can configure the keybinds and some features.
